text:
NEON GENESIS EVANGELION MUSIC DVD is a DVD (Catalog number KIBA-91299) created by GAINAX and published by King Records via its label STARCHILD on 23 August 2006. It was directed and edited by Masayuki. It is a collection of Evangelion clips with songs by various Evangelion works. https://web.archive.org/web/20070918085252/http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=1222 It was sold for ¥2800 and inside the double pack alongside the NEON GENESIS EVANGELION MUSIC remix on 12 August 2006 for ¥5000 (tax included).
